subtitle: 1-Hour Reunion Outline, Speaking Guide & Demo Flow

sections.title: Meeting Agenda (60 Minutes)
sections.content: This document outlines the complete flow for a 1-hour investor presentation. Each section is timed and includes speaker notes, key talking points, and visual cues for the live demo.

rows: Problem framing — the visa wait crisis

callout.title: Pre-Meeting Checklist
callout.content: All demo pages pre-loaded in browser tabs · VPN/Cloudflare tunnel confirmed active · 2-3 real student profiles ready to show · Accounting ledger has recent transactions visible · Agent heatmap has data populated · Print 3 copies of this script · Dress code: business formal

sections.title: Opening & Rapport (5 min)
sections.content:
Do NOT open with the product. Open with the problem. Create immediate emotional resonance.

Opening Script

"Every year, over 300,000 Latin Americans apply for US visas. The average wait time for an interview appointment? 14 to 24 months. The cost of a single missed or poorly timed appointment? Not just money — it's a year of someone's life on hold."

"ICE Colombia was built to solve this — not just the visa problem, but the entire lifecycle of international education and mobility. And we've turned it into a franchise-ready, AI-powered ecosystem that runs at 90% automation."

Key Points

  • Introduce yourself briefly — emphasize operator + builder hybrid profile
  • Mention the ecosystem is live, serving real clients, generating revenue today
  • This is not a prototype — it's a production system

sections.title: Market Opportunity (8 min)
sections.content:
The Numbers That Matter

Present these figures with confidence — they establish the scale of opportunity.

rows: Franchise addressable locations (COL, ECU, PER, MEX)

callout.title: Competitive Positioning
callout.content: "Our competitors are paper companies with WhatsApp groups. We are a technology company that happens to operate in international education. That's the moat."

sections.title: Three Pillars of ICE (12 min)
sections.content:
Pillar 1: Revenue Engine (CRM & Lead Pipeline)

  • AI-Powered Lead Scoring — 6-component weighted algorithm (0–100) with conversion probability
  • Kanban Pipeline — NEW → CONTACTED → QUALIFIED → OPPORTUNITY → CONVERTED
  • Auto-Assignment — Round-robin + skill-based routing
  • ETL Ingestion — From events, social media, website forms, partner agencies
  • Follow-Up Cadence Automation — 14-day structured nurture sequence

Pillar 2: Operations Platform (Visa + Student Lifecycle)

  • Visa Rescheduler Bot — Proprietary Playwright-based automation that monitors consulate portals 24/7 and reschedules automatically
  • Student Portal — Self-service document upload, enrollment tracking, GPA/credits visibility
  • Document Workflow — PENDING → REVIEW → APPROVED pipeline with MinIO secure storage
  • Invoice & Payment System — Full billing lifecycle with installment support
  • Program Management — Multi-edition program tracking (Work & Travel, Au Pair, University)

Pillar 3: Enterprise Operations (HR + Finance + Admin)

  • Workforce Command Center — Real-time agent monitoring, attendance heatmaps, performance dashboards
  • Enterprise Payroll System — Automatic hour aggregation → payroll generation → accounting integration
  • Universal Cashflow Ledger — Every payment, every payroll, every transaction in one synchronized general ledger
  • Daily Closure System — POS-grade end-of-day reconciliation
  • Role-Based Access Control — 8 system roles from Student to Super Admin

callout.title: Emphasis Line
callout.content: "This is not 3 separate products. This is one cohesive ecosystem where a student payment automatically creates an accounting transaction, an agent's worked hours automatically calculate their payroll, and a payroll approval automatically registers as a business expense."

sections.title: Live Platform Demo Route (10 min)
sections.content: Follow this exact flow for maximum impact. Pre-load all pages in separate tabs before the meeting. Focus on data flow between modules, not individual button clicks.

rows: Lead flowing through Kanban with AI score overlay
Unified ledger with TRM exchange rate conversion
Daily Timeline tab — visual worked hours
Active Visa Rescheduler jobs running live

callout.title: Demo Pro-Tips
callout.content: Keep narration flowing — never stop to troubleshoot · End the demo by showing a payment create a transaction — the 'wow moment' · If asked about a feature, say 'Let me show you' instead of explaining

sections.title: Technology Moat & IP Assets (7 min)
sections.content: Present the technology stack not as a list of tools, but as a competitive barrier to entry.

rows: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma 6, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ
Playwright headless browser for consulate portal automation
HashiCorp Vault for encrypted credential storage
Cloudflare Tunnels, PM2 process management, self-hosted
50+ API endpoints, 60+ Prisma models, 17 portal modules
Core proprietary product — no competitor has this automated
24–39 hour certified path by role (Agent, Supervisor, Admin)
Purpose-built, not a template — 80,000+ lines of TypeScript

callout.title: Key Investor Line
callout.content: "An investor is not buying a website. You're investing in a franchise operating system — one that includes the technology platform, the operational playbook, the training curriculum, and the brand system to replicate across Latin America."

sections.title: Franchise Model & Revenue (8 min)
sections.content: Present the three commercial models. Emphasize flexibility — each model adapts to the investor's risk appetite.

sections.title: Financial Projections & Use of Funds (5 min)

callout.title: Revenue Upside
callout.content: This projection assumes a conservative subscription model. Revenue share models on high-performing franchises could yield 2-3x multiples above these figures.

sections.title: Anticipated Questions & Responses
sections.content: Prepare for these questions. Rehearse the answers until they feel natural.

rows: What if a competitor copies the visa bot?
Our moat isn't just the bot — it's the entire integrated ecosystem. The bot is the hook, but the CRM, student lifecycle, HR system, and franchise manual create lock-in.
How many clients are you serving today?
[Provide actual numbers] — Emphasize the system is LIVE and generating revenue, not a prototype.
Colombia alone: 50,000+ students apply for US programs annually. W&T, Au Pair, and Visa Advisory in the COL-ECU-PER triangle exceeds $100M.
We built the operating system first, then the franchise model around it. Nobody else in this space has a technology-first approach.
The technology is built. The manual is written. The training is certified. We need capital to REPLICATE. First-mover advantage in LatAm franchise tech.

callout.title: Closing Statement
callout.content: "You're not investing in software. You're investing in the franchise operating system for international education in Latin America. The technology is built. The manual is written. The training is certified. We need capital to replicate."
